name: output_gain_10x_exp023
hypothesis: exp021 (3x GDN3 output gain) was stable but didn't break the plateau; the structural diagnosis predicts the GDN3 signal is drowned by the frozen residual accumulated across 18 layers, so a single layer's 3x may be far too small. 10x tests the magnitude threshold directly: if retrieval emerges, cumulative-residual-dominance was the issue and a large enough gain fixes it from the GDN3 side; if stable-flat, the magnitude hypothesis is definitively dead (3x AND 10x both fail -> airtight handoff); if diverges, the frozen out_proj can't handle large GDN3 signals (another proxy constraint).
